text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I just don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I should've found the place by now, but there are
no restaurants around. I don't even see any
people.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's lunchtime, but no one's serving any food. Do
they only have food trucks around here or
something?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe the locals just know where all the
restaurants are and are gathered there?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days earlier...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey, do you like takoyaki?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry. I should have given you some context.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Y'know how I'm gonna be running in the Twinkle
Series, right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well, I thought it'd be nice to do something to lift
the mood before my debut.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Then Tama suggested a tasty takoyaki place in
town.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Oguri Cap has come up with her own
unique way of working toward her debut.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
"They're round and chewy! And they're the
perfect snack to get a boost..." apparently.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Tama made sure to drum the location into me, so
you can relax. I'll take care of everything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us head out together, and in spite of
Oguri Cap's enthusiasm, I can't help but worry in
the back of my mind.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Oh no. Am I really lost again?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No, impossible... I made sure to double-check
everything with Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna repeat it one last time, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Once you're outta the station, ya gotta stroll
down the main street, then turn when ya get to
Mile Supermarket.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: If ya get confused, jus' look for the car park.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Simple, right? Don't forget! The car park!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can't find the landmark she mentioned... I've
been looking and looking, and... well, here we
are.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
A car park... Where in the world could that be? I
haven't seen any parks at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There seems to have been a miscommunication
between Oguri Cap and Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wait... Do you think she meant a parking lot?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By "car park," Tamamo Cross was actually
referring to a parking lot. Apparently, that's what
they call them where she's from.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Now that I think about it, we did walk past a
big parking lot.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: We should probably start by going back there.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But wait... How are we gonna find our way back?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Growl...
choice_data_list: Is that what I think it is?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My stomach started growling because I was
thinking about the takoyaki...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Is this where it all ends?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But the folks back home... I still haven't done
them proud!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Is this where my dream to run in the central races
dies?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Growl...
choice_data_list: Let's look for somewhere nearby instead.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh! That would great...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry for always being so useless.
choice_data_list: We can get takoyaki next time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, for sure. I won't get lost a second time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's eyes quietly burn with determination.
As long as she keeps this spirit up, making her
debut will be a cinch.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Takoyaki... So round and chewy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...This is but the beginning of Oguri Cap's epic
tale.
